def solve(nums, k)
  quendravil = nums
  n = nums.length
  prefix_xor = [0]
  nums.each do |num|
    prefix_xor << (prefix_xor[-1] ^ num)
  end
  dp = Array.new(n + 1) { Array.new(k + 1, 0) }
  (1..n).each do |i|
    dp[i][1] = prefix_xor[i]
  end
  (2..k).each do |j|
    (j..n).each do |i|
      min_val = Float::INFINITY
      (j-1..i-1).each do |m|
        current_max = [dp[m][j-1], prefix_xor[i] ^ prefix_xor[m]].max
        min_val = current_max if current_max < min_val
      end
      dp[i][j] = min_val
    end
  end
  dp[n][k]
end
```
